system.description:
Endurance represents your stamina and conditioning. Enduring harsh elements or running a long distance requires an Endurance roll. This is the skill to use when something might cause a character to collapse or pass out. The Target Number should be set by the Gamemaster.

When pushing your body to the limit, make an Endurance Skill roll. On a Normal Success, you remain active without resting. A Total Success imparts an automatic success for the same activity in the same period. A Failure indicates your body must rest or pass out in a number of rounds equal to your Hardiness (passing out lasts 1d10 minutes).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 1: Skills
